title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・キーワード③

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship puts on a fantastic performance and
comes in first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think having a rival gave her an extra push to
reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There were laughs, and there were tears...
Looking back, I definitely took the long way
round getting here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But despite that, those days were worth it! They
led me to today's victory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The romance of the journey... It warms the heart
like, well, chestnuts roasting on an open fire!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I lost to her again?! But hooow?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just saying, but this time and last time were
total flukes, okay?! I'm totally winning next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Have something to say to me, do you?
You've got chestnuts, I'll give you that.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, sure! I'll be waiting for you at the next
big race! Be there, or be square!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll be there all right, and you're gonna wish
you'd never challenged me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like another showdown with Tosen Jordan
is in the cards.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now to head off in search of new chestnuts...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? There's something on the ground where
Jordan was standing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let's see here... A piece of paper with "RI" on it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Probably. So far I've gotten "UM," then "QUA,"
and now "RI"...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that doesn't make a lick of sense!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, our mystery puzzle-giver has fulfilled
their promise and given us a new clue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There must be a reason why someone is doing
this, considering all the effort that's been put into
it, but I have no idea what it is. Just then...

Yes! Excellent! There is no greater treasure than
a bond formed in the heat of battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That familiar voice is the same one I heard before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The person who wrote the Book of Secrets and
prepared the clues... I have a feeling they're
someone we know fairly well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night, Gold Ship has the same dream again.
"Ship of gold, resting beneath the waves..."

"Uncharted territory lies just before you... Now is
the time to unleash your true potential..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... That dream again, huh? It's getting pretty old at this point...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So sleepy... Maybe practicing the Trinity Pose will
wake me up.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I see you're wastin' time on useless crap, same as
ever.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Nakayama. Wanna join m—hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa, what's with this sense of déjà vu? Wait,
Nakayama kinda sounds like the person in my
dream...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, are you the one who keeps showing up in my
dreams?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...The heck?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's quite a question... You take one too many
hits to the head or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A swing and a miss, huh? Never mind. Forget I
said anything.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(I dunno what any of this means, but something's
telling me Nakayama might be my next key to
solving this mystery...)
